events.title: moose sighting
events.status: Moose spotted along the route in northern forest country.

events.title: sow with coys sighting
events.status: Observed a sow with cubs from a safe distance and continued on route.
events.photoCaption: Sow with cubs sighting on day 12.

events.title: Wild camp at edge of Agassiz National Wildlife Refuge
events.thought: Nearly 75 miles of gravel and dirt roads today.
events.status: Wild camp established for the night just outside of the refuge.
